PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DADOUSH, MIKE DADOUSH, SAADEH AZMI DADOUSH, JEHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGAI, RAYMOND $5,975.83 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,975.83, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR: DEFT TO PAY $830 TO ZYAD DADOUSH[BY HIS G.A.L.], $2050 TO SAADAH DADOUSH, $100 TO JEHAN DADOUSH, AND $2995.83 PROP DAMAGES TO AZI DADOUSH. STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFFS.
